title: cyra
subtitle: Can You Really Assist?
description: Real-time AI voice assistant powered by Google Gemini. Enables natural conversations and file system interaction through dynamic tool execution.

title: iOSAS Suite

title: RapCap

description: Desktop photobooth software for events. Import image templates, adjust frames, capture photos, and save. Built with Electron.

title: tapang-sarap

description: Mobile app connected to hardware for real-time temperature monitoring. Set thresholds and receive notifications.

title: snipboard
subtitle: npm Package
description: Publish npm package (@danieljohnbyns/snipboard) for uploading images to snipboard.io. Automated CI/CD testing via GitHub Actions.

title: System-Architecture-Course

description: A work-in-progress course for becoming a proficient System Architect. Divided into phases covering different skill sets and knowledge areas.
